title: paeonia peregrina var. humilis
intro: Paeonia peregrina var. humilis, also known as the low-growing peony, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Paeonia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Paeonia peregrina var. humilis are believed to provide various health benefits, including pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved wound healing. It can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various conditions, such as arthritis and skin irritations.
